body: The bracket's next instalment is already inked. Tonight's result is filed, the trophy still pending, and the road through the WPL playoffs has one fewer team on it.

The win lifts ${winner.name} to ${winnerPosition} on ${winnerPoints} points. ${loser.name} stay where they were on ${loserPoints} — the league table updates without much drama, but the gap at the top is rarely as steady as it looks.
${winner.name} climb the table to ${winnerPosition} on ${winnerPoints} points; ${loser.name} are left to weigh how the night could have gone differently. Plenty of cricket still to be played.
${winner.name} bank the win and the points; ${loser.name} regroup. The WPL grind continues — every result is a single brick in the season's wall, and tonight's just went into place.
